expenses.alreadyApprovedHint: Any change reverts the approval. The co-parent needs to approve again.
expenses.awaitingApprovalHint: Waiting for the co-parent to approve
expenses.howItWorksBody:
1. Each parent logs what they paid.
2. The other approves or rejects.
3. The balance shows who owes whom.
4. You settle up between yourselves.

welcome.subject: Welcome to Kindar, {name}!

alergias.title: Start with the most severe allergy
alergias.description:
It will show up automatically:
• On the shareable emergency card
• In summaries before appointments
• On the co-caregiver's app in real time
alergias.actionHint: Opens the form to register a new allergy

crescimento.title: Start by logging the last visit
crescimento.description:
Each measurement becomes:
• A growth curve over time
• A comparison with WHO standards by age
• An exportable history for the pediatrician
crescimento.actionHint: Opens the form to register weight/height

medicamentos.title: Track doses without memorizing schedules
medicamentos.description:
By registering a medication:
• The app reminds you of the next dose
• The co-caregiver sees what was already given
• The history is saved for the pediatrician
medicamentos.actionHint: Opens the form to register a medication

profissionais.title: Start with the pediatrician
profissionais.description:
With each professional saved:
• Direct contact in 1 tap (WhatsApp/call)
• Link to appointments to track history
• The emergency card brings in the pediatrician automatically
profissionais.actionHint: Opens the form to register a professional

doencasActive.title: All quiet for now
doencasActive.description:
When a cold, bug or allergy shows up, log it here to:
• Let the co-caregiver know in real time
• Keep a history for the pediatrician
• Track progress with photos and symptoms
doencasActive.actionHint: Opens the screen to log a new illness episode

doencasAll.title: Start with the latest episode
doencasAll.description:
Each saved episode becomes:
• A health timeline for the child
• Insights into recurring patterns
• Context for the next doctor
doencasAll.actionHint: Opens the screen to log a new illness episode

notifPrefs.testSent: Notification sent — check that it arrived.
notifPrefs.testFailed: Couldn't send — check that notifications are enabled in iOS.
notifPrefs.offlineBannerBody: Your changes will be saved to the server.

softPrompt.title: We'll let you know when it matters
softPrompt.subtitle: Kindar uses notifications for things like:
softPrompt.line2: Messages from your co-parent in chat
softPrompt.line4: Important changes in expenses and decisions
softPrompt.footer: You can customize everything later in Profile → Notifications.

saudeTab.emptyDescription: Start by logging what you use most day to day.

school.phoneInvalid: Invalid phone — enter a valid number or leave it blank.
school.kindEventDesc: Something that happens on a date

profileScreen.logoutConfirm: Are you sure you want to log out?
profileScreen.securitySubtitle: Lock with Face ID / Touch ID

calendarTab.cancelSwapBody: You'll withdraw the swap request for {date}. The other parent will be notified.
calendarTab.monthTitleA11y: {month} {year}. Tap to return to the current month.
calendarTab.editScheduleDesc: Adjust the 14-day pattern and regenerate events
calendarTab.setupScheduleDesc: Set who has the children on each day
calendarTab.syncAlertBody: We'll export upcoming events (custody, activities, events) to the "Kindar" calendar on your phone. Previously synced events will be replaced.
calendarTab.emptyDayPrompt: Nothing scheduled here. What would you like to add?

activitiesNew.title: New activity
activitiesNew.checklistSubtitle: Items to prepare before the activity
activitiesNew.errorSelectDay: Select at least one day of the week

appointments.deleteWarnScheduled: Scheduled appointment — it will disappear from both parents' agenda.
appointments.deleteWarnCompleted: Completed appointment — deleting loses notes and history.
appointments.deleteWarnCancelled: Cancelled appointment — only the record will be removed.
appointments.nextSummaryDesc: Clinical briefing since the last completed appointment

medications.saveWithoutDetailsBody: You didn't enter {missing}. It will be recorded as "As prescribed" — you can edit it later. Save anyway?
medications.lastDoseRecentWithInterval: The last dose was {time} ago. The prescription suggests every {hours}h. Confirm anyway?
medications.lastDoseRecent: The last dose was {time} ago. Confirm anyway?
medications.itemA11yHintActive: Tap to view history, long press to finish
medications.actionsHint: Confirm each dose given. Finish when the treatment is over.

healthRegister.title: Log event
healthRegister.step1Subtitle: Select the event type and the child
healthRegister.frequencyPlaceholder: E.g. every 8 hours, twice a day
healthRegister.locationPlaceholder: E.g. São Lucas Clinic, XYZ Hospital

sensitiveTopics.requestDeleteBody: If you are the only guardian in the group, the note will be deleted now. If there are other guardians, the deletion must be approved by the other one.
sensitiveTopics.approveDeleteBody: {name} requested the deletion of {title}. Confirm permanent deletion?
sensitiveTopics.youRequestedDeletion: You requested the deletion. The other guardian needs to approve it.
sensitiveTopics.otherRequestedDeletion: {name} requested the deletion of this note.

healthExport.shareA11yHint: Opens the app picker to send the health report

vaccinesScreen.addBirthDateBody: Add {name}'s date of birth in the profile
vaccinesScreen.loadErrorTitle: Couldn't load the vaccination schedule right now
vaccinesScreen.loadErrorBody: Check your connection and try again. Your history is still available below.

vaccineCard.uploadSubtitle: The AI reads the page with the vaccines and identifies each dose, batch and date. Review before saving.
vaccineCard.confirmSubtitle: Check that the vaccines and dates are legible. Blurry or dark photos give incomplete results.
vaccineCard.processHint: Sends the photo to the AI to identify vaccines
vaccineCard.processingSubtitle: This may take a few seconds
vaccineCard.previewSubtitle: Review before saving. Already-registered ones are unchecked; yellow alerts need a check.
vaccineCard.warnDuplicateA11y: Vaccine already registered — unchecked by default
vaccineCard.warnOldAnnualA11y: Annual vaccine with an old date — check the year
vaccineCard.warnLowConfA11y: OCR recognized this with low confidence — review the data
vaccineCard.errorProcessing: Error processing the photo ({status}). Please try again in a moment.
vaccineCard.errorNoVaccines: No vaccines identified. Try a clearer photo.
vaccineCard.savedSkippedOne: 1 skipped due to an invalid date:
vaccineCard.savedSkippedHint: Edit the photo or the dates and try again.

appointmentSummary.emptyDesc: The summary aggregates clinical data for a specific child.
appointmentSummary.noCompletedAppointment: No appointment recorded as completed — the period starts at birth.

activityDetail.deleteQuestion: What do you want to delete?
activityDetail.deletedOccurrence: This day's occurrence was removed from the calendar.
activityDetail.deletedFuture: This occurrence and the following ones were removed.

healthTimeline.emptyFilterHint: Tap "All" to see the family's full history.
healthTimeline.emptyDescription: When you log an appointment, medicine, or symptom, it appears here in chronological order.

childGeneral.editSubtitle: Name, birth date, CPF, RG, allergies and notes

childDocs.deleteMessage: "{name}" will be permanently removed. Are you sure?
childDocs.uploadHint: Photo, PDF or Word — up to 10MB
childDocs.listHint: Tap to open · Trash icon or long-press to delete

editChild.photoPrompt: Where do you want to get the photo from?

aiAssistant.title: Kindar AI
aiAssistant.subtitle: Family assistant
aiAssistant.greeting:
Hi! I'm Kindar AI 👋

I can help with expenses, events, appointments, family summaries and much more. What do you need?

calendarNew.errorDatePast: You can't create an event on a date that has already passed
calendarNew.assignedToHint1: Leave blank for events without a fixed person in charge (e.g. parent meeting, party). For
calendarNew.assignedToHint3: in the calendar — this flow automatically overrides the regular schedule.
calendarNew.colorHint: Color on the calendar (set by the person in charge)
calendarNew.colorHintNone: No fixed person in charge — neutral color
calendarNew.recurrenceNote: Recurring events (Daily, Weekly, Biweekly, Monthly, Custom) are available only in the PWA. To repeat an event over several days in a row, turn on "{label}" above.

vacationScreen.errResponsibleRequired: Choose who is with the child during the vacation
vacationScreen.errOverlap: There is already a vacation period that overlaps this range. Edit the existing one or adjust the dates.
vacationScreen.colorHint: Vacation color on the calendar (of the chosen responsible)

prescriptionScreen.uploadSubtitle: The AI reads the prescription and extracts medications with dose, frequency and duration. Review before saving.
prescriptionScreen.confirmSubtitle: Check that the prescription text is legible before processing. Blurry or dark photos give poor results.
prescriptionScreen.processHint: Sends the photo to the AI to extract the medications
prescriptionScreen.processingHint: This may take a few seconds
prescriptionScreen.previewSubtitle: Review the data and adjust if needed. Uncheck medications you don't want to save.
prescriptionScreen.errorProcessPhoto: Error processing the photo ({status}). Please try again shortly.
prescriptionScreen.errorNoMeds: No medication identified. Try a sharper photo or another prescription.

chatThread.exportPdfDescription: Generates a PDF of the group's messages. You can save it to Files or share it.

custodySchedule.needTwoGuardiansDesc: The custody schedule requires the other co-guardian in the group. Invite them first.
custodySchedule.generateConfirmBody: This will generate the schedule for {months} months starting from {date}. Previous events (if any) in this period will be replaced. Continue?

calendarInvite.uploadHint: Our AI reads the invite (or event image) and extracts title, date, time and location automatically.
calendarInvite.processingHint: The AI is extracting the data
calendarInvite.reviewHint: Review the data below and adjust if needed before saving.
calendarInvite.errorNoImage: Image has no data. Try another photo.
calendarInvite.errorProcessing: Error processing the invite ({status}). Please try again.

professionals.whatsappInvalid: Invalid WhatsApp — enter a valid number or leave it blank.
professionals.deleteImpactAppointments: appointments list them as the professional

emergency.regenerateTokenBody: The current link will stop working. Share the new link with whoever needs it.
emergency.shareMessage:
Emergency card for {name}: {url}

No login needed. Expires after use or in 24h.
emergency.regenerateTokenA11y: Regenerate token and revoke current link
emergency.shareNote: The link works without login. Share it only with people who care for the child.

allergies.deleteMessage: Remove "{name}" from {childName}'s record? This action cannot be undone.

illnessList.closeEpisodeBody: Mark "{title}" as resolved? It stays in the history.
illnessList.evolutionNotePlaceholder: Optional note (fever went down, still coughing...)

healthDetail.ocrComingSoon: Coming soon: scan prescriptions with the camera

vaccineNew.duplicatePrefilledHint: The fields were pre-filled. If this is another dose, tap "Save anyway".

authSignup.mustAcceptTerms: You must accept the Terms of Use and the Privacy Policy.
authSignup.confirmEmailBodyPrefix: We sent a verification link to
authSignup.confirmEmailBodySuffix: Click the link to activate your account and come back here to sign in.
authSignup.spamHintSuffix: . The email can take up to 1 minute to arrive.
authSignup.resendFromLoginHint: You can resend the email from the login screen if you need to.
authSignup.lgpdA11y: I agree to the Terms of Use and the Privacy Policy
authSignup.lgpdSuffix: . Your data will be handled in accordance with the LGPD.

authLogin.resendFailed: Couldn't resend. Try again in a few minutes.
authLogin.resendSent: Sent! Check your inbox and spam folder.

onboardingInvite.title: Invite the other parent
onboardingInvite.subtitle: Kindar works best when both guardians are on board. Send an invite now — it takes 30 seconds.
onboardingInvite.shareBody: Share the link below with the person you want to invite. You can use WhatsApp, SMS, email or whatever you prefer.

documents.deleteMessage: "{name}" will be removed. Are you sure?
documents.openDocHint: Tap to open, long-press to delete
documents.listHint: Tap to open · Trash icon or long-press to delete

childNew.title: New child
childNew.sexHint: Used for WHO growth curves. Optional.
childNew.allergiesHint: Separate with commas. E.g.: peanut, milk, dipyrone

deleteAccount.confirmAlertMessage: This action is irreversible. All your data will be permanently deleted.
deleteAccount.successMessage: Your account and all associated data have been removed. Thank you for using Kindar.
deleteAccount.headline: This action is permanent
deleteAccount.exportHint: Once confirmed, it cannot be undone. Consider exporting your data first by emailing suporte@kindar.com.br.
deleteAccount.appleSubBody: If you have an active subscription via the App Store, it is NOT automatically cancelled when the account is deleted. Cancel it manually under Settings > Apple ID > Subscriptions > Kindar.
deleteAccount.acknowledge: I understand this action is irreversible and will permanently delete all my data on Kindar.

whatsappLink.errPhoneRequired: Enter the number with country code (e.g. +55)
whatsappLink.unlinkConfirm: Remove the link with {phone}? You can reconnect later.
whatsappLink.intro: Link WhatsApp to get reminders and interact with Kindar by message.

growthChart.title: WHO Growth Curve
growthChart.emptyWeight: Log weight measurements to see {name}'s data on the chart.
growthChart.emptyHeight: Log height measurements to see {name}'s data on the chart.

swapRequest.visitExplanation: You're asking to visit even on the other parent's day. It's not a swap — it's a favor.
swapRequest.noSwapHint: No day offered = counts as a day owed

lockScreen.notEnrolled: Set up {label} in your device settings to unlock.
lockScreen.lockout: Biometrics locked. Use your device passcode.

inviteSend.shareMessage: Hi! {firstName} invited you to join {groupName} on Kindar. Open this link to accept: {link}
inviteSend.shareHelp: Share the link below via WhatsApp, email, or copy it to paste wherever you like.

inviteAccept.declineConfirm: You can accept later if you get the link again. Decline now?
inviteAccept.description: A co-parent invited you to share a group on Kindar. By accepting, you'll have access to the children's calendar, decisions, expenses, and health.

eventDetail.deleteMessage: This permanently removes the event. It can't be undone.

decisionDetail.noArgumentsYet: No one has argued yet. Be the first to share your point of view.

groupRoleDesc.admin: Can manage members, invites and group settings.
groupRoleDesc.member: Can view and add content, but doesn't manage the group.
groupRoleDesc.readonly: View only — cannot edit or create anything (mediator, lawyer, etc.).

familiaScreen.removeMemberMessage: Remove {name} from the group? Their history is kept but they lose access.
familiaScreen.leaveGroupMessage: You'll lose access to {group}. You can't undo this yourself — only an admin can add you back.

weekendPlanner.heading: Upcoming weekends
weekendPlanner.footer: "Free" = weekend with the other guardian — you can travel!

billing.accessPausedBody: Your 30 free days have ended. Subscribe to Harmonia to keep organizing the routine of those you care for — without losing any data.
billing.planLoadFailed: Couldn't load the plan right now. Check your connection and try restoring your purchase below, or subscribe at {url}.
billing.supportPrompt: Need help or want to close your account? Contact support

app.updatedToast: Kindar updated to the latest version

pushDebug.title: Push diagnostics
pushDebug.intro: Technical screen to validate each layer of the push notification pipeline. Use only when the team asks.
pushDebug.card4Hint: Sends a push to ALL of the user's apns_token

proposeBalance.giftDesc: You give up this day without charging anything
proposeBalance.forgiveDesc: Forgive part of the accumulated debt
proposeBalance.resetDesc: Start over from scratch. Both must approve.
proposeBalance.howToTreat: How should this operation be handled?
proposeBalance.resetWarningBody: Resetting the balance clears all pending items. {name} must approve.

security.enrollFirstMessage: To use the lock, open Settings > {kind} and set up your biometrics. Then come back here and turn it on again.
security.confirmEnable: Confirm with {kind} to turn on the lock
security.confirmDisable: Confirm with {kind} to turn off the lock
security.heroSubtitle: Protects your data (children, chats, expenses, health) with your device's biometrics.
security.statusReady: Set up and ready to use
security.statusNotEnrolled: Set up {kind} in your device Settings
security.timeoutSectionHint: How long after leaving the app before it locks again.
security.privacyNote: Biometrics stay on your device's chip. Kindar never sends or stores your face or fingerprint. If {kind} fails 3 times, you can use your device passcode instead.
security.timeoutImmediateDesc: Most secure — asks every time you open the app
security.timeout1mDesc: To switch apps quickly without re-authenticating
security.timeout15mDesc: A balance between convenience and security
security.timeout1hDesc: Most convenient — asks once an hour

careRoutine.title: Who drops off and picks up
careRoutine.subtitle: Set up your children's weekly routine.
careRoutine.fullDay: Full day (same person drops off and picks up)
careRoutine.tapToCycle: Tap each cell to switch who's responsible.
careRoutine.presetIDropYouPick: I drop off · you pick up
careRoutine.presetYouDropIPick: You drop off · I pick up
careRoutine.awaitingAck: Waiting for the other caregiver to see it
careRoutine.activationDescription: Set who drops off and picks up {childName} each day of the week.
careRoutine.journeyEmpty: Add times to the routine to see the day's journey.
careRoutine.custodyHint: Whoever has the child that day does drop-off and pick-up.
careRoutine.alternatingHint: Set up both weeks — they alternate.
careRoutine.tapToToggle: Tap to mark the days with drop-off/pick-up.

careRoutine.swap: Swap today's {leg} to the other caregiver

careRoutine.saveFailed: Couldn't save the routine. Please try again.

briefing.swap: {count, plural, one {{name} requested a swap} other {# swap requests}}

briefing.pendingExpense: {count, plural, one {1 expense to approve} other {# expenses to approve}}
briefing.pendingDecision: {count, plural, one {1 decision to vote on} other {# decisions to vote on}}

briefing.expensesNew: {count, plural, one {1 expense update} other {# expense updates}}
